name: pixtuoid
title: Pixtuoid
description: Manage which AI coding-agent CLIs feed your Pixtuoid office, and launch the floating window — without leaving Raycast.
author: IvanWng97

commands.name: manage-sources
commands.title: Manage Sources
commands.description: List every agent CLI Pixtuoid knows about and connect/disconnect each one.

commands.name: start-floating
commands.title: Start Floating Window
commands.description: Open the Pixtuoid floating desktop window.

preferences.name: binaryPath
preferences.title: Pixtuoid Binary
preferences.description: Absolute path to the pixtuoid executable. Leave empty to auto-detect (login-shell PATH, then Homebrew / Cargo / ~/.local/bin).

scripts.gen:contract: json2ts -i contract/source-status.schema.json -o src/contract.ts && json2ts -i contract/outcome-row.schema.json -o src/contract-outcome.ts
